summary: Frontend testing iteration 7 - Premium feature locking and subscription flow verification. All 4 test requirements PASSED: Premium badges with lock visible on Miroir/Oracle des Rêves/Cosmos, popup 'Passer en Premium' appears on click, 'Découvrir Premium' redirects to /subscription, Carnet des Rêves accessible without restriction.

issues: Premium badges use purple (#9B59B6) color scheme which is distinctive and clear

critical_code_review_comments: PREMIUM_FEATURES array correctly defines ['mirror', 'astro', 'dream-oracle'] as locked features (line 26 home.tsx)
subscriptionStatus?.tier check properly determines access - 'premium' and 'lifetime' users get full access
Premium popup correctly shows feature name via PREMIUM_FEATURE_NAMES mapping
Carnet des Rêves (id: 'dreams') is correctly NOT in PREMIUM_FEATURES array - free access works
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium feature locking is working correctly. Guest users (free tier) see Premium badges on Miroir, Oracle des Rêves, and Cosmos menu items. Clicking shows 'Fonctionnalité Premium' popup with 'Découvrir Premium' button that redirects to /subscription page. Carnet des Rêves is free and navigates directly to /dreams. Subscription page shows Essentiel (9.99€/mois), Premium (18.99€/mois), and Accès à Vie options.

Test 1 - Premium badges with lock on fea.details: Miroir, Oracle des Rêves, and Cosmos all display 'Premium' badge with lock icon. 'Premium' text found 3 times in page content corresponding to the 3 locked features.

Test 2 - Click on locked feature shows P.details: Clicking on Miroir shows popup with title 'Fonctionnalité Premium', description 'IA Miroir fait partie de l'offre Premium.', and mentions Oracle des Rêves/Astrologie. Same behavior for Oracle des Rêves and Cosmos.

Test 3 - Découvrir Premium button redire.details: Clicking 'Découvrir Premium' in popup successfully redirects to /subscription page showing Essentiel (9.99€/mois) and Premium (18.99€/mois) plans with features list.

Test 4 - Carnet des Rêves accessible wit.details: Clicking on 'Carnet des Rêves' navigates directly to /dreams page without showing any Premium popup. Free access confirmed as expected per requirements.

subscription_page_details.lifetime_option: Accès à Vie with code input
